name: Soup Restaurant Group Limited
summary: Soup Restaurant Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates restaurants. The company operates 19 restaurant outlets in Singapore and Malaysia under Soup Restaurant, CAFE O, and POT LUCK brands, as well as 2 franchised outlets in Indonesia. It also sources, supplies, processes, and distributes raw materials and food products, as well as provides procurement services; and offers job training and vocational rehabilitation services. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Singapore.
